name: OpenSky Weather
description: Real-time weather data and forecasts for any location worldwide. Provides current conditions (temperature, humidity, wind) and multi-day forecasts. Useful when an agent needs to answer weather-related questions or plan around weather conditions.

capabilities.name: get_current_weather
capabilities.description: Get the current weather conditions for a specific location, including temperature, humidity, wind speed, and a text summary.

capabilities.name: get_forecast
capabilities.description: Get a multi-day weather forecast for a specific location. Returns daily high/low temperatures, precipitation probability, and conditions.
